title: Plum.my's More Weapons
description: Vanilla friendly mod that adds more weapons
body:
![Plum.my's More Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56628a911d0a1d28d96b4a5f5edf0b6bf995edd6.png)"Plum.my's More Weapons" is a mod that adds new Sets of weapons and some unique weapons.

Weapons sets from mod:
- Daggers (wood - netherite)
- Claymores (iron - netherite)
- Battle Axes (wood - netherite)
- Sickle (iron - netherite)

Unique weapons from mod:
- Quartz Cutlass (sword made out of quartz)
- Wither Skull Club (Wither skeleton skull on a blaze rod that gives enemies Withering effect)
- Bread Sword ("Bread made out of Sword")

Made with Mcreator
